nodes.text: function compute(body: Record<string, unknown> | string): BodyDigest.BodyDigest
nodes.docs: Computes a SHA-256 digest of the given body.
tags: body - The body to digest (string or object).
A digest string in the format "sha-256=base64hash".

nodes.text: function verify(digest: BodyDigest.BodyDigest, body: Record<string, unknown> | string): boolean
nodes.docs: Verifies that a digest matches the given body.
tags: body - The body to verify against.
True if the digest matches, false otherwise.

```ts
import { BodyDigest } from 'mpay'

const isValid = BodyDigest.verify(digest, '{"amount":"1000"}')
```
